case_title: SHELTON, RICHARD vs. NATIONAL GUARDIAN et al

docket_entries.description: CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHELTON, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL GUARDIAN CUMMINGS, GREG DBA SABA ALARM DOES 1 TO 10 STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-19-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-19-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-28-1996
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SHELTON, RICHARD

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-19-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-19-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR APR-18-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-18-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-18-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE-MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. HEARING SET FOR MAY-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
